content.en:
Golden God Department.

At this moment, several ancient demon-level existences were extremely angry.

"Damn, there are so many tribes who have taken refuge in the Dragons!!!"

Jiechi was furious.

At this time, an Ancient Demon-level being suggested, "I propose to destroy these tribes!"

"No!" Jin Annihilation Ancient Demon shook his head, "You can't destroy these tribes, they haven't made it clear that they have joined the Dragon Disciple tribe yet, they just haven't accepted the call, if you destroy them now, the consequences will be very serious, maybe in the middle of the war, they will suddenly turn back." I think it's better to suppress the dragon tribe in one go, and those tribes won't dare to resist. "

Jin Tu Gu Mo also said: "Yes, if we slaughter too many tribes, it will cause the anger of all tribes, and we still need these tribes to do things for us, we can't do this." Furthermore, if you send an Ancient Demon out alone now, if you are attacked by Proz, you will indeed not be killed, but Proz can severely damage us and capture us. Except for the Golden Exterminator Ancient Demon, no one can deal with Pleoz, and he can't act rashly. "

They discussed it for a long time and finally came to a choice.

"Let those tribes that follow us attack the Dragons tribe together, and hit the 04 Dragons tribe in one go!"

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon said.

"Yes!"

Several other Ancient Demon Levels responded.

Soon.

The Golden God Department led a large number of tribes' emperor and king levels, plus the emperor and king levels of the Golden God Department itself, to kill the Dragon Disciple Tribe.

As soon as possible, the dragon disciple tribe knew about the movements of the Golden God Department.

And at this moment, the dragon disciple tribe and the emperor level of some tribes have also come here, ready to resist the Golden God Department together, and some tribes are still waiting, and they have not supported the dragon tribe at the first time.

If the Dragonspur Tribe didn't have the slightest power to resist and were scattered at the slightest touch, then they would naturally take refuge in the Golden God Department again.

At least let them see hope, and they will fight against the Golden God Ministry!

......

"The Golden God Department is here!"

The Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon Pleoz muttered.

Due to the limited time, the Dragon Disciple Tribe has not given birth to a new Ancient Demon Rank at present, but the Sky Devouring Demon Dragon still has the confidence to fight against the Golden God Department.

Bang!!!!

An ancient demon level appeared, facing each other across the distant void.

The Sky Devouring Demon Dragon plus the four Ancient Demon Levels of the Dragon Disciple Tribe, and the Ancient Demon Rank existence Haru, that is, the six Ancient Demon Levels.

At this time, the side of the Golden God Department was only seven ancient demons.

Of course, the ancient demon level of the dragon disciple tribe is too weak, and naturally it is not comparable to the seven ancient demon level of the Golden God Department, and they will definitely be beaten.

"Golden Slayer Ancient Demon, what are you doing in the Dragon Disciple Tribe?"

Pleoz asked directly, not looking down on the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon at all.

At the beginning, he was a peak-level ancient demon, and the Golden Extermination Ancient Demon was only a top-level ancient demon at the beginning, like an ant in his eyes.

Even if the current Golden Slayer Ancient Demon broke through to the peak level of the Ancient Demon, he still couldn't look down on it.

"Plotz, you quit the territory of the Golden God Department and give up the Dragons Tribe, I can pretend that this incident has not happened!"

"Golden Slayer Ancient Demon, what kind of thing are you, and you are also a threat to this seat?" Prooz said coldly.

"Then we have to fight, I can involve you, a few ancient demon levels of the dragon disciple tribe are just ordinary ancient demon levels, not even the top ancient demon level, and our Golden God Department has three top ancient demon levels, which is enough to sweep them. "

"And Haru, you actually escaped from the seal, you are simply looking for death, if it weren't for the order of the main department of the mother of Aluo, you would have died I don't know how many times!"

Being stared at like this by several ancient demon-level beings from the Golden God Department, Haru was a little nervous.

But death is not allowed between ancient demon-level existences, so he is not afraid of being killed, and with Proz here, he doesn't believe that he will be captured.

So, he quickly calmed down.

"Kill!"

Proz is short-tempered, and directly led these ancient demon-level beings to kill the past and confront the ancient demon-level of the Golden God Department.

Bang!!!!

The void above turned into an ancient demon-level battlefield, and the space continued to distort.

At this time, Ye Tian also mixed into a battlefield to observe this battle.

One of the most eye-catching was naturally the battle between Proz and the Golden Exterminator, and as soon as they fought, the Golden Exterminator was suppressed.

"It's so strong!"

He broke through to the peak ancient demon level, but he was also at the peak ancient demon level, and there was also a gap.

And Pleoz's physical body is too terrifying, no wonder Proz's original soul will was only injured, but there was nothing wrong with the physical body.

This body is at least three times his size!

Thundered!!!!

The Golden Demon Slayer was suppressed, but the other Ancient Demon-level existences of the Golden God Department had beaten the Ancient Demon-level existences of the Dragon Disciple Tribe.

As soon as the Ultimate Rule Realm opened, several newly promoted Ancient Demon Levels directly lost their ability to resist, and could only rely on the treasures given by Proz to resist the Ultimate Rule Realm.

However, the effect of the treasure is limited, and it is impossible to resist it for too long.

As for Haru, it's not good, he's still a little bit close to the top ancient demon-level combat power, and he was also beaten.

Add to that the disparity in numbers, and it's even worse.

At this time, an ordinary ancient demon-level powerhouse of the Golden God Tribe, Lingyang Ancient Demon, was ready to kill all the emperor-level existences of the Dragon Disciple Tribe.

And at this moment, a figure appeared, directly intercepting the Lingyang Ancient Demon.

"It's you, the snake mist of the Silver Snake Tribe, it turns out that you didn't die, but broke through to the ancient demon level!" Lingyang Ancient Demon said in surprise.

However, in terms of combat effectiveness, the Snake Dance Ancient Demon 703 is still not an opponent.

But the snake dance ancient demon jumped out, naturally for a reason.

Just when the other ancient demon levels of the dragon disciple tribe couldn't bear it, something happened.

Rumble!!!!

A huge ancient ape came like a huge ancient ape that pierced through the ultimate void, and its terrifying aura made those top-level ancient demon-level beings tremble.

"It's him, the top Ancient Demon Grade Being-Calamity Australopithecus!"

"Damn, how did he come here?"

Calamity Australopithecus, the ancient demon level existence, although it is only the top ancient demon level, but the combat power is extremely terrifying, the physical body is very terrifying, it is said that even the peak ancient demon level is difficult to kill him, the calamity ancient ape has a dozen or three top ancient demon level on a battlefield, and kill two, heavy damage to one.

Now, Calamity Australopithecus has arrived.

"Hahaha, Golden Exterminator, my Pleoz's connections in the Ancient Demon Level are still okay, Calamity Ancient Ape used to befriend me, and now I asked him to help, it's normal!"

Plotz said with a smile.

I saw the Calamity Ancient Ape coming, and with a punch, it blasted away the Realm Red Ancient Demon and injured it.

Seeing this, the Golden Exterminator Ancient Demon frowned, he didn't expect that Proz would actually invite foreign aid, with the Calamity Ancient Ape, even if he summoned the other ancient demon levels of the Golden God Department, he couldn't help the Dragon Disciple Tribe.
